opinion.h4: IN RE SARNER. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF NEW JERSEY. No. 490. Decided January 11, 1960.
opinion.p: David D. Furman, Attorney General of New Jersey, and Morton I. Greenberg, Deputy Attorney General, for appellee.
The motion to use the record in No. 803, October Term 1958, is granted. The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed as moot.
361 U.S. 233 IN RE McDANIEL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF CALIFORNIA. No. 252, Misc. Decided January 11, 1960.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
